series_metadata.series_title: Accounting Records, Budgets, and Financial Materials
series_metadata.series_description: Any materials relating to the Straight A Fund finances or disbursement of grant funds.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: and audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved.
